stages.name: filing
stages.description: Create cheque-bounce cases in CIS (NACT/138 NIA). Produces cis_cnr per case.

stages.name: allocation
stages.description: Allocate each filed case to target_court_no via bulk_allocation (formaction=8).

stages.name: select_court
stages.description: Court mapping: set CIS proceedings active court via select_courtajax.php before scrutiny/registration work.

stages.name: case_objection
stages.description: Scrutinize filed case via case_objection.php/case_objectionajax.php; defaults to no-objection ready-for-registration.

stages.name: registration
stages.description: Register cleared filing via registration.php/registrationajax.php flag=Register.

stages.name: case_proceeding
stages.description: Select COURT_NO from Data/config.json, then record case proceeding via proceedings/case_proceedingajax.php x=submitdata in the same CIS session.

stages.name: bulk_order_upload
stages.description: Select COURT_NO from Data/config.json, then upload order/judgment PDFs through proceedings/bulkupload.php in the same CIS session. case_no is auto-populated from the registration stage's registered_case_number; order-specific fields (file_path, document_type, order_no, order_date) come from Data/bulk-order-upload-drafts.json.

stages.name: process_prefetch
stages.description: Prefetch accused/addressees and addresses for process generation; output is user-editable.

stages.name: process_generation
stages.description: Generate selected summons/process drafts and download draft PDFs.

stages.name: process_upload
stages.description: Final stage: upload generated/signed process PDF via proceedings/process_upload_ajax.php.

stages.name: publish_process
stages.description: Optional: publish generated process/notices, or delete generated draft notices when action=delete_draft, via proceedings/publish_notice_ajax.php.
